title: Kernel orthestrationについて、codexだけでなくglmやclaudeとの協奏として設定されているか確認せよ
summary_text: Most likely failure point is a contract mismatch inside timeout-audit itself: - `audit_canary_timeout()` requires `("plan","simulate","critique","repair","replan")`, but the real canary prompt only mandates `plan/critique/replan` for quick quorum. On timeout, audit often returns non-zero due missing `simulate`, so fallback cannot promote to PASS. [check-codex-kernel-prompt.sh#L185](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/check-codex-kernel-prompt.sh#L185) [check-codex-kernel-prompt.sh#L189](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/check-codex-kernel-prompt.sh#L189) [codex-prompt-launch#L409](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tools/codex-prompt-launcher/bin/codex-prompt-launch#L409) Other concrete failure points that also block timeout->PASS: - Timeout audit session lookup is stricter than guard resolution (`source='exec'` + `title LIKE marker` only), so it can miss the actual rollout row. [check-codex-kernel-prompt.sh#L174](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/check-codex-kernel-prompt.sh#L174) [check-codex-kernel-prompt.sh#L176](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/check-codex-kernel-prompt.sh#L176) [session_watch.py#L520](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tools/codex-kernel-guard/src/codex_kernel_guard/session_watch.py#L520) - Fallback is only attempted when `smoke_rc==124`; PTY timeout path can return a killed-process code instead, so audit fallback may never run. [check-codex-kernel-prompt.sh#L230](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/check-codex-kernel-prompt.sh#L230) [run_with_pty.py#L52](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tools/codex-prompt-launcher/scripts/run_with_pty.py#L52) [run_with_pty.py#L82](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tools/codex-prompt-launcher/scripts/run_with_pty.py#L82)
